sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n24253" key="deutero/lepton" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δευτερό-λεπτον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, Astron., <sense id="n24253.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">second of a minute of degree,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Rhetor.</author> </bibl> in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Cat.Cod.Astr.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.194.22</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
